title: eriocaulon subtile
intro: Eriocaulon subtile is a type of aquatic plant, also known as a waterwort, that belongs to the family Eriocaulaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eriocaulon subtile include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Eriocaulon subtile is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can be dried or used fresh in various remedies.
